GiraffeAlignment.HaplotypeSampling.inclu.description: Include reference in sampled haplotypes (default: true)

GiraffeAlignment.HaplotypeSampling.step_.description: Sliding window step size for seqkit (default: 50000)

GiraffeAlignment.base_file_name.description: Base name for all output files. Should not contain spaces, #, or comma characters.

GiraffeAlignment.giraffe_parameters.description: Giraffe graph reference bundle (GBZ/DIST/MIN/ZIPCODES/PATH_LIST) plus linear reference (FASTA/FAI/DICT).

GiraffeAlignment.input_cram_list.description: List of input CRAM/BAM files to align using vg giraffe. All files in the list are processed together.

GiraffeAlignment.output_haplotypes_cram.description: When true, run haplotype sampling and output a haplotype CRAM.

GiraffeAlignment.preemptible_tries.description: Number of preemptible retries for scatter tasks.

GiraffeAlignment.reads_per_split.description: Approximate number of reads per split chunk for parallel processing.

GiraffeAlignment.ref_files_for_tarball.description: List of reference FASTA files used to build the reference cache.

GiraffeAlignment.references.description: Linear reference genome (FASTA, FAI, DICT) used for read processing and downstream sorting/markdup.

GiraffeAlignment.sorter_params.description: Parameters for sorting and marking duplicates.
